category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a utility to keep git repos fresh.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo already points to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface from the supplied source facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/imsky/git-fresh, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies keeping Git repos fresh; source_facts.executables lists git-fresh.
